output.sar_narrative: get_transaction_details returned a fraud_score of 0.0174 for a $131.00 Product W debit card transaction occurring at hour 14.75, well below the low-risk threshold of 0.40. get_shap_explanation shows all six top SHAP features carry negative contributions (range: −0.22 to −0.42 in log-odds), indicating the model's top drivers are collectively reducing — not elevating — fraud probability. get_customer_history for card1 13443 over 30 days shows 4 prior transactions with a mean amount of $128.75, consistent product code (W), and overlapping active hours (11, 12, 14, 22), suggesting the flagged transaction fits the card's established behavioral pattern. get_reason_codes returned an empty adverse_action_codes list, corroborating the low-risk classification.

supporting_evidence.claim: The model fraud score is very low at 0.0174, below the 0.40 medium-risk threshold.
The transaction amount of $131.00 is consistent with the card's recent spending range.
All top 6 SHAP features decrease fraud probability; the highest-magnitude contributor (card2) has a SHAP value of −0.4215.
supporting_evidence.value: top_shap_features rank 1–6 all have direction: decreases_risk; shap values: −0.4215, −0.40857, −0.32963, −0.28416, −0.25279, −0.22035

supporting_evidence.claim: The P_emaildomain feature is flagged with reason text 'Email domain associated with elevated fraud risk,' yet its SHAP value is −0.22035 (decreases risk) — a tension noted without resolution.
supporting_evidence.value: feature: P_emaildomain, feature_value: 1.0, shap_value: −0.22035, direction: decreases_risk, reason_text: Email domain associated with elevated fraud risk

supporting_evidence.claim: The transaction amount ($131.00) falls within the card's 30-day historical range of $80–$171, with a mean of $128.75.
The transaction's product code (W) and email domain (anonymous.com) match exclusively observed values in the card's 30-day history.
The transaction hour (14.75 ≈ 2 PM) is consistent with the card's known active hours in the past 30 days.
No adverse action reason codes were returned, consistent with the low fraud score and all-negative SHAP profile.

top_shap_features.reason_text: Card type or issuer profile associated with elevated risk
High transaction velocity or frequency on this card
Transaction pattern deviates from established account behavior
Transaction pattern deviates from established account behavior
Transaction pattern deviates from established account behavior
Email domain associated with elevated fraud risk

output.note: shap_value > 0 increases fraud probability; shap_value < 0 decreases it. Values are in log-odds space.
Codes reflect features that increase fraud probability (positive SHAP only).
